metadata.appDescription: Paste your URL for live-site brand DNA, then generate on-brand ad creatives in every format in minutes.
metadata.adStudioDescription: Pick your brand, focus, layouts, and sources, then generate ad images in a few steps.
metadata.chatDescription: Chat with Aphilio: describe what you want and get an AI-generated image grounded in your brand DNA.
metadata.settingsDescription: Manage your account, subscription, billing, and preferences.
metadata.onboardingDescription: Set up your account and get started with Aphilio.
metadata.dnaPageDescription: DNA extracts branding from the website you paste. Colors, typography, logos, and voice from that page.
metadata.signInDescription: Sign in with Google to access your Aphilio workspace and extract brand DNA from any URL.
metadata.plansDescription: Choose monthly or yearly billing and unlock ad creatives, the library, and brand-aware chat.

thankYou.metaDescription: Your subscription is active. Continue to your Aphilio workspace.
thankYou.title: Thank you for subscribing
thankYou.subtitle: Premium tools are unlocked. If something still looks locked, wait a few seconds and refresh the dashboard while we sync your plan.

landing.subhead: We scan your site and generate high-converting, on-brand creatives in seconds
landing.featuresHeading: From raw URL to on-brand ads in one platform
landing.howTitle: From URL to on-brand ad creatives in three steps
landing.step1Description: Drop any link and Aphilio launches it in a real browser session, reading your live page exactly as it renders to your users.
landing.step2Title: We extract your full brand DNA
landing.step2Description: Colors, typography, logos, voice, personality, and marketing angles are captured and structured into a reusable DNA profile in your workspace.
landing.step3Description: Use your DNA profile in Ad Studio or AI Chat to generate on-brand images, copy, and ads across all formats in seconds, always perfectly on-brand.
landing.featureSourceDescription: Paste any SaaS URL and get a complete brand profile: colors, typography, logos, voice, personality, and positioning angles, extracted from the live site in seconds using a real browser.
landing.featureShipDescription: Select marketing angles, choose your ad templates and formats (1:1, 4:5, 9:16, 16:9), and generate a full batch of on-brand creatives, all grounded in your exact DNA profile.
landing.featureLibraryDescription: Every generated creative saved automatically in one place, organized by brand and session, easy to revisit, download, and reuse across campaigns.
landing.featureAccountDescription: Describe what you need in plain language. Aphilio pulls your brand DNA as context and generates on-brand visuals directly in the conversation, no additional briefing required.
landing.ctaBandTitle: Paste your URL. Get on-brand ads.
landing.ctaBandDescription: Sign in and start generating creatives instantly.
landing.whyTitle: Built different from every generic AI ad tool
landing.whyItem1Desc: We open your URL in an actual browser session so we capture what users see: live colors, rendered fonts, and real images, not raw HTML.
landing.whyItem2Desc: Colors, typography, logos, voice, personality, and marketing angles, all structured into a reusable DNA profile that lives in your workspace forever.
landing.whyItem3Title: AI outputs locked to your brand
landing.whyItem3Desc: Every generated image, headline, and ad is grounded in your exact DNA profile. The AI stays on-brand without you writing a single brief.
landing.whyItem4Desc: Square, portrait, story, and landscape, generate all four aspect ratios at once and ship to any placement without manual resizing.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Full access to every feature. Switch or cancel anytime.
landing.pricingProF2: Ad Creative Studio, all formats & layouts
landing.pricingProF3: Brand-aware AI chat with image generation

signIn.tagline: Extract brand DNA from any URL. Generate on-brand ads in minutes.
signIn.googleSignInDescription: Sign in with your Google account. No password required.
signIn.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to our service terms and data practices.
signIn.benefit1: Extract brand DNA from any URL

welcome.subtitle: Let's set up your workspace in a few quick steps.

url.title: What's your website?
url.description: We'll analyze your site to extract your brand DNA (colors, fonts, logo, and voice) so everything we generate is on-brand.

language.title: Choose your language
language.description: We'll use this language when generating your ad creatives and content.

scrape.successMessage: We've captured the brand profile for {hostname}. Redirecting you now…
scrape.loadingMessage0: Opening your website in a browser session…

dashboard.subtitle: Capture brand context, create on-brand visuals, and keep everything in your library.
dashboard.libraryLockedAria: Subscribe to unlock your creative library

dna.title: Brand DNA
dna.description: Capture branding from your website: colors, typography, logos, and voice.

chat.title: Chat
chat.description: Describe what you want in plain language. Aphilio pulls brand context and generates on-brand visuals in the thread.

adCreatives.title: Ad Creatives
adCreatives.description: Draft on-brand ad concepts, headlines, and copy from your DNA, tuned for social, search, and fast iteration.

admin.heading: User administration
admin.subheading: Sign in as a subscriber to reproduce issues, grant demo credits via Polar (negative meter ingest), or verify their workspace. Only platform admins can access this page.
admin.listUsersError: Could not load users. Ensure you are signed in as an admin.
admin.impersonationBanner: You are viewing the app as another user.
admin.adjustCreditsInsufficientBalance: Not enough credits to subtract this amount.
admin.grantCreditsErrorUnauthorized: You are not allowed to adjust credits.
admin.grantCreditsErrorPolar: Polar is not configured or the request failed.

chat.title: Chat
chat.welcomeTitle: What would you like to create?
chat.welcomeSubtitle: Pick a context, add references if you like, then describe the image you want.

suggestions.hero: Bold hero banner for a fintech app
suggestions.summer: Summer sale ad for fashion brand

chat.referenceImagesSortedAria: Reference images from this context, sorted A to Z by URL
chat.contextNoImages: No images found in this context.

library.title: Creative Library
library.subtitle: All your generated ad images, saved automatically.

settings.pageSubtitle: Manage your account, subscription, and preferences.
settings.accountDescription: Your profile details from your sign-in provider.
settings.subscriptionDescription: Manage your plan, billing, and subscription details.
settings.subscriptionManageDescription: Update payment method, download invoices, or cancel your plan.
settings.subscriptionUpgradeDescription: Subscribe to unlock all features and start generating on-brand creatives.
settings.subscriptionPlanYearlyHint: Best value when you are all-in on the workspace.
settings.subscriptionPortalError: Could not open the billing portal. Try again in a moment.
settings.creditsDescription: Control spending beyond your cached balance and set an optional cap on how far negative your balance may go locally.
settings.balanceHint: Displayed from your synced local balance.
settings.overageDescription: When off, generation is blocked at zero credits. When on, you can allow unlimited overage or cap how much extra spending is permitted beyond zero.
settings.spendingLimitDescription: When overage is on, choose unlimited local debt or a maximum number of credits you may go below zero before generation is blocked.
settings.spendingLimitUnlimitedHint: Your cached balance can go as negative as needed until Polar enforces limits.
settings.spendingLimitCappedHint: Generation is blocked if it would push your balance below this many credits under zero.
settings.spendingLimitCappedInputAria: Maximum credits of spending beyond zero
settings.preferencesDescription: Customize your workspace language and display settings.
settings.preferencesLanguageDescription: The language used for the interface and generated content.
settings.creditsLockedDescription: Subscribe to manage credit balance, overage, and spending limits for generation.

adCreatives.studioSubtitle: Brand DNA → visuals in four steps.

history.deleteSessionDescription: This removes {sessionTitle} from history and deletes generated images from this run in your library.

generatedCard.generatingHintPremium: Premium quality. This takes a moment.
generatedCard.generatingHintFast: Fast mode. This takes a moment.

noData.title: Add a brand first
noData.description: Save a brand in your library first, then you can use this studio to generate ads.

step1.title: Which brand are we designing for?
step1.description: Pick one of your saved brands to work with in this session.
step1.nextHint: Next you'll narrow the creative focus.

step2.title: Choose your focus
step2.description: Select one or more angles to guide your ad copy.
step2.noAngles: Nothing to choose here yet. Try refreshing your brand data from the dashboard, then come back.

step3.title: Layouts and placements
step3.description: Select formats in each theme and tune aspect ratio per creative.

step4.title: Generate your images
step4.layoutsReady: {count} layout ready. Select quality, then generate each card.
step4.layoutsReadyPlural: {count} layouts ready. Select quality, then generate each card.

referenceImages.noSimilarSections: No images found in similar sections. The AI will use your brand logo only.
referenceImages.referenceImageCount: {count, plural, one {# reference image} other {# reference images}}
referenceImages.referenceFromSections: from {count, plural, one {# similar section} other {# similar sections}}

angleCard.ariaToggle: Toggle selection for this marketing angle: {angle}

dna.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove {name} from your library.
dna.sessionLoadError: That studio session could not be loaded. It may have been removed or the brand is no longer available.
dna.scrapeHeroDescription: DNA captures branding from your URL. We read colors, typography, logos, and voice in a real browser session.

contextResult.noPersonalityData: No personality data. Re-scrape to generate.
contextResult.emotionalTriggersHint: Lean on these when you write copy or brief creative; they map to what moves your audience.
contextResult.marketingAnglesHint: Scroll horizontally. Each card is a distinct hook or positioning idea for campaigns.
